description: Account of the qodesh ca. 1234. This is a double leaf from a notebook, containing four columns of items. Both revenue from rent and building expenditures are included. There are Muslims and Christians among the tenants listed. The document is typical of a first recording of revenue and expenditures for private reference. Details on revenue from apartments are mixed together with accounts of bricks and baskets for building purposes. Mentions a wind catcher (bādhanj). (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 435 #131)
tags: badhanj, waqf, qodesh, account, heqdesh, 13th c, Coptic numerals
description_he: חשבון הקדש, כ-1234. קונטרס כפול עם ארבעה טורים: הכנסות שכירות והוצאות בנייה. בין הדיירים מוסלמים ונוצרים. מוזכר מלכוד רוח (באד'הנג').
